sglang.title: chore: bump v0.4.0.post2
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

FlashInfer v0.2.0 has some issues, but our version v0.4.0.post1 will install it by default.
WGMMA requires CUDA 12.3 or higher, set 12.4.1 as the default.
Recent fixes on the main branch can be included in this release version.


Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to t

sglang.title: fix #2528
sglang.author: zhyncs
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
build time error not runtime error

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.

 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix issues for `Pixtral-Large-Instruct-2411`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Previously the mistral-format Pixtral implementation assumes all models under PixtralForConditionalGeneration have the same token id for [IMG_BREAK] and [IMG_END] tokens. This is in fact not true and thus Pixtral-Large-Instruct-2411 is broken on 0.6.5.
This PR adds a workaround to address this issue

vllm.title: [CI] Fix flaky entrypoint tests
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR sets temperature to 0.0 for a few OpenAI client tests related to multimodality to prevent errors on CI due to flakiness introduced by a non-zero temperature.

vllm.title: [cd][release] add pypi index for every commit and nightly build
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
verified that pip install --pre -U vllm --extra-index-url=https://dsefy9jmd4lqu.cloudfront.net/nightly/ works now.
cc @simon-mo to set up an alias to wheels.vllm.ai
see dtrifiro/vllm-wheels-bucket-indexer#3 for more details.
